overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character exploring the interior of an Old West saloon or hotel. The character navigates a dimly lit wooden lobby with period furnishings, enters a narrow hallway, briefly investigates a side room, and proceeds toward a door at the corridor's end. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with warm lamplight illuminating the detailed wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: saloon lobby with reception desk and staircase

agents.ego_description: walking around the lobby, observing the reception area and furnishings before heading toward the back hallway

notable_agents.action: clerk standing behind reception desk, stationary and observing

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with white railing leading to upper floor
dark wooden counter with papers and items on surface
double-armed wall lamp with warm yellow glow
ornate floral wallpaper covering the walls
victorian-style sofa with curved wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit saloon lobby featuring a wooden reception desk with a clerk behind it, a staircase leading upward, and period-appropriate furnishings including an upholstered sofa and wall sconces providing warm amber lighting.

events.description: character opens door and enters narrow wooden hallway from main lobby

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor, passing closed wooden doors on either side

entered.detail: tight hallway with vertical wooden plank walls and ceiling
small wall-mounted lamps providing dim lighting along the hallway
closed wooden panel doors lining both sides of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open lobby into a narrow, dimly lit wooden corridor. The space is enclosed with vertical wooden planks and lined with closed doors on both sides, illuminated by sparse wall-mounted lamps.

events.description: character opens wooden door on right, revealing bedroom interior with red lighting, then closes door and continues

agents.ego_description: stopping to open a door on the right, peering into the room briefly, then closing it and stepping back

entered.detail: briefly visible room containing bed, dresser, and red-lit lamp
door swung open revealing the interior space

segments.scene_description: The character pauses in the hallway to interact with a door on the right, opening it to reveal a bedroom interior illuminated by a red lamp, then closes the door and prepares to continue down the corridor.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward the door at the end of the hallway

entered.detail: wooden door at the terminus of the hallway with wall sign nearby

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds to the end of the narrow wooden hallway, approaching a final closed door. The corridor remains dimly lit with wooden walls and flooring consistent with the building's Old West architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a spacious, warmly lit saloon lobby into the claustrophobic confines of a narrow wooden corridor. It begins by navigating the open lobby past a reception desk and upholstered furniture, where amber wall sconces cast a soft glow over the wooden architecture. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts from the open room into a dim, enclosed hallway lined with vertical planks and sparse lighting. The camera then pauses as a door on the right is opened to reveal a bedroom bathed in a deep red light, before the door closes and the forward momentum resumes. The scene finally concludes as the camera proceeds through the remaining stretch of the wooden corridor toward a final closed door at the end of the hall.
